TRADE_OUTCOME_FINAL: Iṣowo rẹ {tradeId} ti de ipo ikẹhin: {status}
SIGNAL_PREMIUM_UNLOCKED: Wiwọle ami aladanla fun olupese {providerId} ti fun
SIGNAL_PREMIUM_EXPIRED: Ẹbọ aladanla rẹ fun olupese {providerId} ti pari
RISK_ALERT: Itaniji ewu: Ipo rẹ kọja opin ewu
PRICE_STALE_WARNING: Alaye owo fun {asset} ti di atijọ. Iṣowo ti duro.
LIQUIDITY_WARNING: Omi ọja kekere ti ri fun {asset}. Iṣowo rẹ le ni iyọkuro.
PREFERENCE_UPDATED: Awọn ifẹ rẹ ti ṣe imudojuiwọn
PAYMENT_EXECUTED: Isanwo ti ṣeto rẹ ti ṣe
PAYMENT_CANCELLED: Isanwo ti ṣeto rẹ ti fagile
PAYMENT_REMINDER: Iranti: O ni isanwo ti ṣeto fun {date}
